rows.label: xs04080100_MSG0003
rows.name: Horrible[ST:wide ]― our precious heritage from Earth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04080100_MSG0004
rows.name:
Apparently, they aren't
simply hostile aliens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04080100_MSG0005
rows.name:
They're attacking the Life
with clear intent.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04080100_MSG0006
rows.name:
Come to think of it... earlier
they said "Kill all Earthlings."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs04080100_MSG0007
rows.name: We might still make it in time. Let's do it.[ST:wait ]
